description: This Java class provides cryptographic helper functions, including password hashing with BCrypt and hashing of sensitive tokens/OTPs using SHA-256 with base64 encoding. It is part of an authentication service in a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: CryptoService
classes.description: A service class that provides cryptographic utility functions for hashing passwords and tokens.

methods.name: hashPassword
methods.description: Hashes a raw password using BCrypt with a strength of 12.

methods.name: matchesPassword
methods.description: Checks whether a raw password matches a previously hashed password.

methods.name: sha256Base64
methods.description: Hashes a given string using SHA-256, encodes it in base64 URL-safe format without padding, suitable for storing sensitive tokens.
